Superseded by kx-7cb which landed the SABR implementation (sabr.py / sabr_implied_vol)

CLAUDE.md updated with Allium specs section + refreshed ADR list + path fix; 6 ADRs cross-linked to specs; specs/README.md gained ai-insights.allium; ADR-0036 filename normalised; followup issues kx-0e9g and kx-vmwu filed for the two Proposed ADRs. Beads/Session blocks left as-is since they're managed by 'bd setup claude' tooling.
ADR-0026 moved from Proposed to Accepted (2026-05-28). Decision stands; rollout tracked under kx-kdbt.
ADR-0035 moved from Proposed to Accepted (2026-05-28). Phases 1-2 shipped (fix-gateway module with grpc/kafka/session/venue layers), phase 3 mid-flight (dual-path parity tests in position-service).

Vitest + lint pass; Playwright spec committed, acceptance pending ./deploy/redeploy.sh
GRAFANA_ROOT_URL now exported unconditionally from deploy/deploy.sh and deploy/redeploy.sh; takes effect on next /deploy run. Engineering complete.
Aspirational READMEs added to deploy/helm/ and deploy/terraform/

All 18 child issues complete. Walk-through findings landed across 25+ commits: 6 infra/code fixes, 5 trader runbooks + index, 4 diagnostic CLI scripts, alert runbook annotations, deploy script env wiring, and aspirational-infra READMEs.
Shipped a63ba325 — Github icon in header right-cluster links to https://github.com/panayotovk/kinetix in new tab; Vitest 2 specs + Playwright 3 specs green; ESLint clean.
Application.kt split into per-domain Route modules. Now 244 lines (was 797). DevModule.kt, SystemHealthRoutes.kt, AllRiskRoutes.kt extracted. All acceptance tests that were green remain green.

Correlation ID propagation fully implemented and pushed to main: commits 160b5e84 (common infrastructure + tests) and b989de2e (service wiring + 19 Kafka publishers). All unit tests green across all touched modules.
OTel SDK foundation + HTTP/gRPC/Kafka interceptors landed in common/observability. Per-service wiring is kx-ybov.

StatusPages + ApiError shape applied to all 11 backend Kotlin services (position-service, risk-orchestrator, notification-service, audit-service, regulatory-service, reference-data-service, price-service, rates-service, volatility-service, correlation-service, fix-gateway). Acceptance test per service asserts the wire shape.
Added downstream risk-orchestrator /api/v1/reports/recent endpoint (was missing → 404). Tests added at route/service/repo levels.
Enabled percentilesHistogram on gateway Ktor timer (emits _bucket for P95 panels); zero-filled 5xx ratio with 'or vector(0)'. Takes effect on next gateway redeploy + Grafana provisioning reload.

Orchestrator now mirrors persisted P&L attribution onto Prometheus gauges (pnl_attribution_total/unexplained/greek_pnl) via ScheduledPnlAttributionMetricsPublisher. Populates 11/14 panels. Takes effect on next risk-orchestrator redeploy.
Seeded exposure for all 30 counterparties (was 6 G-SIBs only). Tied to CounterpartyTiers.ALL_IDS. Needs demo reset to apply on already-seeded envs.
docker-compose.services.yml now defaults ai-insights-service DEMO_MODE=true (still .env-overridable). Copilot will use the grounded CannedInsightClient on the demo. Effective after redeploy.
SystemDashboard now maps regulatory-service/audit-service to friendly labels + title-case fallback. Vitest verified on main.

UI: useRegulatory treats /frtb/{book}/latest 404 as absent (no console error) — Vitest+Playwright verified. Backend: FrtbSeedJob precomputes a latest FRTB per demo book at bootstrap (unit-tested; 200 on /latest is deploy-gated).

UI: intraday P&L+VaR charts fall back to most-recent session when today is empty, with a 'Last session' indicator — fixes the live empty-chart symptom regardless of seed freshness. Vitest+Playwright verified. Backend trigger additive.
CounterpartyRotation pool widened to all 30 with instrument-type eligibility; distribution logic unit-tested. On-screen exposure deploy-gated (needs trade tape to run on a reseed).

KrdSnapshotSeedJob warms the on-demand KRD endpoint for bond-holding demo books at bootstrap; unit-tested. Note: daily_krd_snapshots (V51) is currently unused by any code — KRD route is on-demand; data appears once rate books hold bonds at query time. Deploy-gated.

Implemented persist+fetch-on-mount (user-approved). risk-orchestrator: V72 latest_stress_batches table + repo, POST .../batch persists, new GET .../batch returns latest. gateway: GET .../batch proxy. UI: getLatestStressBatch fetched on mount renders the grid without Run All. Verified on main: orchestrator+gateway unit suites green, UI tsc/lint clean, Vitest 12, Playwright cold-open 10. Repo IntegrationTest written, deploy-gated (Testcontainers). Cold-open populates after a reseed (demo-orchestrator already fires the sweep).
